content:
Post 1
📉 New 20-day high set, then immediately sold off. ASX 200 closed at 8,772.30, down 66.70pts or 0.75%. Tech cratered 3.98%, dragging the index lower on a Friday. Flat year-to-date tells the real story. #ASX #ausbiz

Post 2
🔴 IT off 3.98%, Materials down 2.84%, Telecoms -1.52%. Energy and Financials held the line, both up near 0.9%. A classic risk-off rotation — defensives bid, growth sold hard into the close. #ASX #ausbiz #energy

Post 3
🛢️ KAR surged 10.84% to AUD 1.79, best in the ASX 200. Karoon Energy led a quiet energy rally while the rest of the market fell apart. Oil names were the only real conviction buys on Friday. #ASX #energy #ausbiz

Post 4
🪙 Gold at AUD 5,805.17/oz. Silver AUD 83.88/oz. With Materials down 2.84% today, metals prices aren't the problem — AUD/USD at 0.6978 is doing the heavy lifting for local gold names. #gold #silver #ASX #commodities

Post 5
Watch whether Energy holds its gains into next week — KAR up 10.84% and BPT up 2.26% need follow-through. ASX flat year-to-date with IT under pressure. Does tech stabilise or extend losses? Drop your call below. #ASX #ausbiz
